title: Production Manager #81758
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Manufacturing/ Food Production
  • Position Title: Production Manager
  • Working Location: Senoko
  • Working Hours: 5.5 days (Mon – Fri, 8am – 5pm; Sat, 8am – 12pm)
  • Salary Package: Basic $6,000 - $8,500 + Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent

Key Responsibilities

  • Responsible for all production matters.
  • Plan and forecast the production schedule based on orders and invoices, and assign daily production tasks to the Factory Manager.
  • Oversee and coordinate the production department’s Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs).
  • Monitor production progress closely, adjust plans when needed, follow production schedules, and improve productivity.
  • Build a strong focus on quality and address quality issues during production.
  • Ensure equipment is used properly, and arrange required maintenance and repairs.
  • Oversee daily production and ensure the production area is kept clean and safe.
  • Implement product/process identification and check that procedures are followed.
  • Handle production reporting, statistics, and related administrative work.
  • Plan and manage cost-saving efforts for production.
  • Organise skills training for team leaders so they can manage safe work procedures.
  • Protect confidential company information and ensure teams follow related rules and processes.
  • Evaluate, train, recognise, and review production employees.
  • Perform other duties assigned by the supervisor.
  • Report to the General Manager.

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Diploma / Bachelor’s Degree in Food Science, food manufacturing, or a related field.
  • Minimum 5 years of relevant working experience, experience in Chinese cuisine or hotpot is an advantage.
  • Strong sense of responsibility.
  • Able to understand business goals and priorities.
  • Strong communication, negotiation, and leadership skills.
  • Able to work effectively with both external parties and internal teams.
  • Proficient in English; ability to communicate with Mandarin-speaking stakeholders for work purposes is an advantage.

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #81758 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
